name: Marketplace
description: Marketplace page for the qontinui-web app. With a project selected (Spec CI seeds an empty 'spec-ci-fixture' project and threads ?project=<id> so the <RequireProject pageName="Marketplace"> gate clears), the page renders its real surface: a 'Marketplace' header with a Publish Package action and a Radix tablist switching between All Packages / Popular / Installed package views. Asserts the page-header and tab structure (data-driven package rows/counts are NOT asserted). The behavioral transition switches tabs and verifies the Radix active-tab state moves.

states.name: Page header
states.description: Top-of-page banner anchoring the Marketplace, with the Publish Package action.

assertions.description: h1 Marketplace heading anchors the page.
Heading text reads 'Marketplace' (role+text cross-check on the same h1).
Publish Package action is present in the header.

states.name: Package view tabs
states.description: Tablist switching between the All Packages, Popular, and Installed package views. The Radix trigger ids embed a render-volatile root id, so tabs are matched by role+text against the stable tablist container.

assertions.description: Tablist container holding the package-view tabs is present.
All Packages tab is present (matched by role+text — id is radix-volatile).
Installed tab is present (matched by role+text — id is radix-volatile).

transitions.name: Switch to Installed tab
transitions.description: Behavioral: clicking the Installed tab moves the Radix active-tab selection away from the default All Packages view. The assertion is that the Installed tab becomes the selected tab (aria-selected=true) — a deterministic UI-state change that does not depend on any package data and mutates no server state (read-only view switch). Tab matched by role+text (Radix ids are render-volatile). activateStates stays on the always-present header so the post-state is a stable structural anchor. This is the proven Radix-tab click pattern (monitor-switch-to-session-history).
